title: Compass Precision Acquires Accu-Tool, LLC
summary: CHARLOTTE, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Compass Precision, LLC (Compass), a Charlotte-based, manufacturer of custom precision metal components announced today that it has acquired Accu-Tool, LLC (Accu-Tool), a North Carolina-based CNC machining provider. Based in Apex, North Carolina, Accu-Tool manufactures complex precision components for customers across the aerospace, medical, semiconductor, and industrial markets, supporting both prototype and production needs.
